results.title: NC doesn’t need me anymore: Aga Ruhullah distances himself from statehood protest
results.description: Umaisar Gul Ganai Kulgam, July 11: National Conference Member of Parliament Aga Syed Ruhullah Mehdi on Saturday said the party “doesn’t need” him anymore, saying he was neither invited nor present at the party convention. He also distanced himself from the party’s Jantar Mantar protest on statehood. Speaking to reporters in Kulgam, Ruhullah, per news [...]

results.title: Alausa hails Tinubu, security forces over rescue of abducted Oyo pupils, teachers
results.description: Alausa congratulated President Tinubu on what he described as an important achievement, applauding the President's leadership and determination to ensure that every available resource was deployed until the abducted pupils and teachers regained their freedom. The post Alausa hails Tinubu, security forces over rescue of abducted Oyo pupils, teachers appeared first on Vanguard News .

results.title: A Devil's Bargain Foretold
results.description: Praful Bidwai’s 2015 Kashmir Times column, republished as an archival note, dissects why a PDP-BJP alliance in Jammu and Kashmir was structurally doomed from inception. He argues that the “grand embrace” would deepen communal polarisation, erode the PDP’s Valley-centric identity, and hand Narendra Modi a cost-free strategic victory. Bidwai details the sharply divergent electoral mandates, ideological incompatibilities over Article 370, AFSPA and Pakistan, and warns that Kashmiris would see such a coalition as capitulation to a hostile Hindutva project. In retrospect, his predictions about the PDP’s rout, abrogation of special status and loss of statehood read like a chillingly accurate document of record.

results.title: Leader vows to avenge martyr Ayatollah Khamenei’s blood
results.description: Tehran, IRNA – Leader of the Islamic Revolution Ayatollah Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei has pledged to avenge the killing of Martyr Ayatollah Seyyed Ali Khamenei after thanking people for their massive participation in the funeral procession and burial ceremony of the martyred Leader last week.
